sourcesContent: ## Examples The `BaseIdModal` component reacts to the `UserClickedOpenModal`, `UserClickedCloseModal` and `UserClickedOutOfModal` to handle its open/close state. The component filters out the events which payload doesn't match its `modalId` prop and reacts only to those who match this criteria. ### Basic usage The component interacts with both `BaseIdModalOpen` and `BaseIdModalClose` components, which have to share the same value in their `modalId` prop to work: ```vue ``` ## Events A list of events that the component will emit: - `UserClickedOutOfModal`: the event is emitted after the user clicks outside the modal. The event payload is the id of the modal and a metadata with the target element that emitted it.
